title: Christmas Delight
description: Addon for Farmer's Delight that adds a wood set and mostly Christmas related food items.
body:
# Christmas Delight
![Most of the items from the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aafa23e27678679086f4f756719b9d1f93943ed1.png)
## Description:
Addon for Farmer's Delight. 
Adds a Cinnamon wood set along with Cinnamon itself and a bunch of recipes crafted with it, and a bunch crafted without it. Most of theese recipes are Christmas related.
## Notes:
I will most likely not port this mod to Forge or any older versions, ports to future versions are not guaranteed. Cinnamon leaves not changing their color in diffrent biomes is intentional. "PacoF" in "Gingerbread Zli PacoF Marko" is misspelled intentionaly.
## **Importnant:**
When picking a version there you can pick between the normal one or the one with "NoRemainder" in it's name. The only diffrnce is that the latter has no base items in cooking (Bowls or Bottles) and those items stack to 64 instead of 16.
## Getting started:
To obtain the Cinnamon sapling you will have to find it in Village chests. Most common in Plains Villages. It's wood can be used normally but can also be cut on the Farmer's Delight Cutting Board with an Axe to obtain Cinnamon itself wich is used for some recipes.
To see the recipes use REI or some other simmilar mod, or give the recipes through a command.
### Content:
- Cinnamon Wood Set
- Various Gingerbread Cookies
- Eggnog
- Logcake
- Lamington
- Candy Cane
- Chicken With Mlinci
- Makos Bejgli
- Hot Chocolate
- Christmas Pudding
- Burek
- Wafer
- Vanillekipferl
- Cheese Pudding
- Ćevapi With Lepinja
- Fritule
